name: The Doubt
overview: The life of a middle-class family turns upside down when a lawyer contacts them and casts doubt on the paternity of their eldest daughter, which leads the father to suspect his wife's infidelity since the purported father of his daughter was his and his wife's college friend.

trailers.title: El Shak Series Promo / برومو مسلسل الشك - رمضان 2013
